channel.title: War on 2 More Weeks
channel.description: Recent content in War on 2 More Weeks

item.title: Russian Strikes Kill Dozens Across Ukraine Overnight, Truce Two Weeks From The Next Ceasefire
item.description: Russian forces launched waves of missiles and drones at Ukraine over the past week, killing at least 28 people around Kyiv on 5 July and 22 more on 6 July, according to Reuters and the Associated Press. The Institute for the Study of War logged another Russian drone-and-missile barrage on the night of 11–12 July. The ceasefire everyone is waiting for is, as is its habit, two weeks from the next talk.
